topStories.description: Smartphone ​chip designer Qualcomm on Tuesday unveiled a $20 ​billion stock buyback program as it looks to take advantage of a steep drop in its share price, ‌which ⁠has been ⁠hit by a global memory supply crunch ​that is expected to slow handset manufacturing.

topStories.description: Rare US-Hamas talks come as the war on Iran strains the battered Gaza 'ceasefire' and post-war plans.

dailyNews.title: OpenAI expands government footprint with AWS deal, report says
dailyNews.description: OpenAI has reportedly signed a partnership with AWS to sell its AI systems to the U.S. government for classified and unclassified work, marking an expansion beyond its Pentagon deal last month.

dailyNews.title: Israel, US first be ‘brought to their knees’: Mojtaba Khamenei on ‘right time for peace’ as Iran's Larijani gets killed
dailyNews.description: Israel announced the elimination of Iran's security chief Ali Larijan. An Iranian official revealed that new supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei rejected proposals to ease tensions, insisting the US and Israel must first be subdued before any peace talks.

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran conflict: 'This is not Europe's war'—EU nations rebuff Trump's call to send warships to Hormuz Strait
dailyNews.description: Europe has made it clear that it is not going to engage in the US and Israel's war in Iran, adding that Americans chose this path. Luxembourg's Deputy Minister went a step further with his rebuke of Donald Trump, stating that they will not be ‘blackmailed’ by Washington.

dailyNews.title: Watch: Dancing Robot Suddenly Glitches, Shocking Diners In California
dailyNews.description: A Haidilao restaurant in California saw a robot malfunction and dance uncontrollably, forcing staff to step in, with the incident going viral online.

dailyNews.title: US west coast prepares for 'dangerous' heatwave in early spring
dailyNews.description: Severe weather is plaguing the US from coast to coast, bringing a mix of extreme heat and bitter cold.

dailyNews.description: The French president described his plans for expansion as forward deterrence. What's behind his move?

dailyNews.title: The US-Israel war on Iran is shaped by religion as much as strategy
dailyNews.description: The conflict has mutated into a zero-sum collision of competing messianic frameworks.

dailyNews.title: Iran blames US, Israel for Hormuz tensions as crisis risks energy supplies
dailyNews.description: Iran's Araghchi calls for global condemnation of ‘military aggression’ that disrupted transit through Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: DC pipe bomb suspect claims Trump's Jan 6 pardon applies to him, filing to dismiss charges
dailyNews.description: Accused pipe bomber seeks dismissal under Trump's Jan. 6 pardons, claiming explosive devices planted at RNC and DNC qualify for presidential clemency.

dailyNews.title: 'Baywatch' star Alexandra Paul arrested after allegedly stealing beagles in Wisconsin raid
dailyNews.description: "Baywatch" star Alexandra Paul was arrested in a Wisconsin animal rights raid that allegedly freed 31 beagles from a commercial breeding facility over the weekend.

dailyNews.title: TSA official warns smaller airports could shut down amid DHS funding crisis
dailyNews.description: TSA warns smaller airports may shut down as the DHS shutdown forces security workers to quit, with callout rates jumping from 2% to over 10% nationwide.

dailyNews.title: USC legend says he's given school officials strong answer on whether he'd unretire number for recruits
dailyNews.description: USC legend Matt Leinart refuses to unretire his No. 11 jersey for recruits, citing transfer portal concerns and saying only his sons could wear the number.

dailyNews.title: Judge throws out Jets legend's lawsuit against ESPN, NFL Films over viral spat with Brett Favre
dailyNews.description: Mark Gastineau’s lawsuit against ESPN was thrown out after a judge ruled he consented to footage of his confrontation with Brett Favre over Michael Strahan’s record.

dailyNews.title: Wealthy golden visa holders evacuated from UAE as Iran conflict escalates
dailyNews.description: As the UAE evacuates 500 golden visa holders amid escalating Middle East tensions, the action showcases how the investor program provides safety amid geopolitical crises.

dailyNews.title: Dem primary turns ugly: Mills unleashes brutal attack on Sanders-backed Platner in crucial Senate showdown
dailyNews.description: Maine Gov. Janet Mills has launched an attack ad targeting her rival in the Democratic primary, Graham Platner, for his controversial Reddit posts and tattoo.

dailyNews.description: Plus, the champion of “Swedish death cleaning” dies at 91.

dailyNews.title: What’s in Trump’s SAVE Act, the Voter ID Bill Republicans Are Pushing?
dailyNews.description: The legislation would require voters to prove their citizenship in person upon registration, ban IDs without a photo at polling places and criminalize failures to enforce such requirements.

dailyNews.title: M.T.A. Sues Trump Administration to Release 2nd Avenue Subway Funding
dailyNews.description: New York transit officials are seeking nearly $60 million in overdue federal funding to extend the subway line to East Harlem. The administration’s rationale for the freeze has been inconsistent.

dailyNews.title: Trump Officials Weigh New Plan to Stop Offshore Wind Farms
dailyNews.description: Proposed settlements would block wind farms off New York State and North Carolina, according to documents reviewed by The New York Times.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Gutting of Election Security Fuels Worries for Midterms
dailyNews.description: Officials say the crippling of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency, which the president himself created, could open elections to cyberattacks and foreign influence.

dailyNews.title: Trump Signals He May Intervene in Cuba Following Iran and Venezuela
dailyNews.description: Still at war with Iran and in control in Venezuela, President Trump is signaling that he is about to intervene in another country.

dailyNews.title: National Counterterrorism Center director resigns over Iran war
dailyNews.description: The director of the National Counterterrorism Center, a retired Green Beret and longtime supporter of President Donald Trump, says he has resigned over the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls on nations to help secure Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Trump calls on nations to help secure Strait of Hormuz

dailyNews.title: Israel targets more Iran leaders as allies reject Trump's calls for help
dailyNews.description: Israel says it killed Iran's top security official Ali Larijani, as America's European allies reject Trump's demands for help in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: EU rejects Trump's calls for deployments to reopen Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Despite Trump's repeated calls, the EU foreign policy chief says "nobody is ready to put their people in harm's way in the Strait of Hormuz."

dailyNews.title: Top Trump counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump's director of the National Counterterrorism Center, Joe Kent, announced his immediate resignation Tuesday, citing the administration's decision to intervene in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Senate GOP aims to begin marathon debate on SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: The Senate is expected to begin a marathon debate on the SAVE America Act, an elections bill that President Trump has been pressing Republicans to pass.
